Tests the behavior of `Math.ceil` with negative decimal input in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. It verifies that dividing 1 by the result of `Math.ceil(-0.3)` produces `-Infinity`. The `Math.ceil` function rounds a number up to the nearest integer, so `Math.ceil(-0.3)` results in `0`. Dividing 1 by `0` in JavaScript yields `-Infinity`, which is the expected outcome of this assertion. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected result.
